title: The American Biogas Council Applauds Extension of Clean Fuel Tax Credit in House Reconciliation Bill
content: Patrick Serfass, Executive Director of the American Biogas Council, issued the following statement on the House Ways and Means Committeeâ€™s extension of the Clean Fuel Production Tax Credit and refinement of carbon intensity scoring. â€œThe American Biogas Council applauds the House Ways and Means Committee for extending the 45Z Clean Fuel Production Tax Credit in its reconciliation bill. This is a critical step toward supporting reliable renewable fuels like biogas that reduce air and water pollution, create American-made energy, and drive rural economic development. The extension of 45Z ensures continued momentum for investment in biogas systems that turn organic waste into clean energyâ€”benefiting communities, farmers, and rural economies.
author: Analysts Account
